permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., financial statements, base case models, or script files) from the workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to write output files (e.g., Excel workbooks, model outputs, charts) to the workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to execute Python scripts (dcf_model.py, sensitivity_analysis.py) to run financial computations. Allow?
This skill needs to read included Python scripts (dcf_model.py, sensitivity_analysis.py) from the skill package. Allow?
This skill needs to start an interactive Python REPL session to run DCF, Monte Carlo, and sensitivity computations. Allow?
This skill needs to execute financial modeling code inside a REPL session (Monte Carlo iterations, sensitivity tables, scenario calculations). Allow?
This skill needs to read output and state from the REPL session (valuation results, probability distributions, statistical summaries). Allow?
This skill may need to reset the REPL session between model runs to ensure clean state. Allow?
This skill needs to close the REPL session when financial modeling is complete. Allow?
This skill needs to load the authored skill runtime to dispatch financial modeling tasks. Allow?
